description: Provides events and commands for debugging server-side HTTP requests and responses within the Bun runtime.

types.description: Unique identifier for an HTTP server instance.
Unique identifier for an HTTP request.
Unique identifier for a server route.
Identifier for a hot reload instance of a server. Increments each time the server associated with a ServerId is reloaded.
Request / response headers as a flat array of key/value strings. [key1, value1, key2, value2, ...]
Request route parameters as a flat array of key/value strings. [key1, value1, key2, value2, ...]
HTTP request method represented as an integer. (Mapping to be defined, e.g., 1=GET, 2=POST, ...)

properties.name: routeId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the route.

properties.name: path
properties.description: The path pattern for the route (e.g., '/users/:id').

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of the route.

properties.name: paramNames
properties.description: Names of the parameters defined in the path pattern.

properties.name: filePath
properties.description: Filesystem path associated with 'static' or 'html' routes.

properties.name: method
properties.description: The HTTP method associated with the route.

properties.name: scriptUrl
properties.description: url of the script the route is in. Available when the debugger is not attached.

properties.name: scriptLine
properties.description: Line number in the script that started the route. Available when the debugger is not attached.

types.description: Metadata about an incoming server request.

properties.name: requestId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this request.

properties.name: serverId
properties.description: Identifier of the server processing this request.

properties.name: routeId
properties.description: Identifier of the route that matched this request. 0 means no route matched.

properties.name: url
properties.description: Request URL (path and query string).

properties.name: fullUrl
properties.description: Full request URL including host and protocol.

properties.name: method
properties.description: HTTP method as an integer.

properties.name: headers
properties.description: HTTP request headers.

properties.name: params
properties.description: Matched route parameters.

properties.name: hasBody
properties.description: Indicates if the request has a body.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: Timestamp when the request was received by the server (Unix epoch milliseconds).

types.description: Metadata about an outgoing server response.

properties.name: requestId
properties.description: Identifier of the request this response corresponds to.

properties.name: serverId
properties.description: Identifier of the server sending this response.

properties.name: statusCode
properties.description: HTTP status code.

properties.name: statusText
properties.description: HTTP status text.

properties.name: headers
properties.description: HTTP response headers.

properties.name: hasBody
properties.description: Indicates if the response has a body.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: Timestamp when the response headers were sent (Unix epoch milliseconds).

types.description: A chunk of a request or response body.

properties.name: requestId
properties.description: Identifier of the request this chunk belongs to.

properties.name: serverId
properties.description: Identifier of the server handling the request.

properties.name: flags
properties.description: Flags indicating the type of chunk. Bit 0: 1 if this chunk belongs to the request body, 0 for response body. Bit 1: 1 if this is the final chunk of the body, Bit 2: 1 if the chunk is base64 encoded. 0 otherwise.

properties.name: chunk
properties.description: The body chunk data

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: Timestamp when the chunk was received/sent (Unix epoch milliseconds).

types.description: Details about an unhandled exception in a request handler.

properties.name: requestId
properties.description: Identifier of the request where the error occurred.

properties.name: serverId
properties.description: Identifier of the server processing the request.

properties.name: message
properties.description: Error message.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: Timestamp when the error occurred (Unix epoch milliseconds).

properties.name: url
properties.description: url of the script the route is in. Available when the debugger is not attached.

properties.name: line
properties.description: Line number in the script that started the route.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables the HTTPServer domain, clearing any previous data.

events.name: serverStarted
events.description: Fired when an HTTP server starts listening.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this server instance.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: A URL you can fetch from the server. Example: 'http://localhost:3000' or 'https://localhost:3000'

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Timestamp when the server started (Unix epoch milliseconds).

events.name: serverStopped
events.description: Fired when an HTTP server stops listening.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Identifier of the server that stopped.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp when the server stopped (Unix epoch milliseconds).

events.name: serverRoutesUpdated
events.description: Fired when a server starts or its routes are updated (e.g., via hot reload). Provides the complete list of current routes.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Identifier of the server whose routes were updated.

parameters.name: hotReloadId
parameters.description: The number of times Bun has hot reloaded. When hot reloading server-side code, the server ID will be the same and the hotReloadId will increment. When not hot reloading, the server ID will be different and the hotReloadId will not increment.

parameters.name: routes
parameters.description: The complete list of routes currently served.

events.name: requestWillBeSent
events.description: Fired when the server receives an HTTP request, before the handler is invoked. Body content is not included by default.

events.name: responseReceived
events.description: Fired when the server begins sending an HTTP response. Body content is not included by default.

events.name: bodyChunkReceived
events.description: Fired when a chunk of the request or response body is available, after being requested via `getRequestBody` or `getResponseBody`.

events.name: requestFinished
events.description: Fired when the server has finished processing a request and sent the response.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: Identifier of the server handling the request.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp when the request finished (Unix epoch milliseconds).

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Total duration of the request handling in milliseconds.

events.name: requestHandlerException
events.description: Fired when an unhandled exception occurs within a request handler.
